full_text:
Bengaluru braces for heavy pre-monsoon showers & gusty winds as yellow alert issued for next 3 days
According to N Puviarasan, Head of the IMD Bengaluru Centre, a high moisture incursion from the Arabian Sea and shifting wind patterns have created atmospheric instability highly favourable for severe weather.
